findings.note: Criteria cover the target workflow's core risks: source immutability, public/private boundary, PartInst-vs-Package distinction, conservative net extraction, connector confidence, no-connect capture, and downstream handoff readiness.
No missing hard gate was found for the synthetic fixture. The gate intentionally includes J1 overconfirmation and USB_CC2 invention because those are likely failure modes for schematic-intake models.
The criteria require facts, boundaries, and artifact families rather than golden wording, ordering, or YAML style.

The golden output inferred descriptive roles such as microcontroller and 3v3_regulator from names/values. Candidates are not required to use those role labels; the frozen gate evaluates identity, evidence separation, net handling, and handoff correctness.

limitations: Default subagent_quality_first review was unavailable under the current runtime policy, so this calibration is explicitly labeled cli_only_calibration.
This is a public-safe synthetic fixture and does not validate parser behavior against real project EXP.xml variants.
